title: SQL Mission 9: Conditional Aggregation In One Pass

initialState.content:
-- Mission 9 Guidelines
-- Single grouped output for 2025
-- Use SUM(CASE WHEN ...) for status-specific counts

SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
  -- TODO completed count
  -- TODO cancelled count
FROM orders
WHERE
  -- TODO date range 2025
;

rules: must_include:sum(case when status = 'completed' then 1 else 0 end) as completed_orders
must_include:sum(case when status = 'cancelled' then 1 else 0 end) as cancelled_orders
